title: Sharples PC-81,000 Super-D-Canter Centrifuge, 316/317 SS
shortDescription: Sharples PC-81,000 Super-D-Canter solid-bowl decanter centrifuge in 316/317 stainless steel, 25″ x 115″ bowl with a 2300 RPM max speed and 125 HP drive. Very good condition and includes a rebuilt spare rotating assembly.
description: Max bowl speed 2300 RPM (1870 x G), 25″ x 115″ ID, hogged-out cake ports with wear liners, 8.5″ single lead STC-tiled conveyor, 125 HP motor 460/3/60/1800 RPM, 40 HP ECB backdrive with controller, 98:1 gearbox, guards, lube system, vibration switch/isolators & control panel. Very good condition. Includes rebuilt spare rotating assembly.

title: Sharples PM75000 Super-D-Canter Decanter Centrifuge
shortDescription: Reconditioned Sharples PM75000 Super-D-Canter stainless steel decanter centrifuge with a 2600 RPM max bowl speed, 150 HP main motor and 40 HP VFD backdrive. Ships ready to run with a six-month warranty.
description: 1 – RECONDITIONED Sharples model PM75000 Super-D-Canter Centrifuge. Stainless steel. Maximum bowl speed: 2600 RPM. With 10 degree taper beach. Hogged out solid discharge ports, adjustable liquid discharge ports, 10 in. single lead conveyor with carbide tiles on the taper & first 2 ½ flights of the cylindrical section, stellite hard surfacing on the remaining Quasi-Axial flights. A reconditioned 95:1 gearbox shall be supplied. A 150 Horsepower (HP) motor will drive the bowl and a 40 HP VFD motor will control the back drive conveyor speed. The controls will be new & mounted in a Nema dust tight, water tight enclosure. The frame and upper casing will be cleaned & painted. The oil lubrication system for lubricating the pillow blocks will be reconditioned. The unit is set up for polymer feed with a two piece feed tube. The centrifuge & motors will include belts, vibration isolators, vibration switch, and couplings shall also be supplied new. A six month warranty is included. Unit has been reconditioned and is ready to ship. F.O.B. – LOCATION.

title: Dorr-Oliver Merco 16L Solid Bowl Decanter Centrifuge, 316 S/S
shortDescription: Used Dorr-Oliver Merco 16L solid-bowl decanter centrifuge in 316 stainless steel with a 4000 RPM max bowl speed, 5″ double-lead conveyor and 30 HP drive with ECB backdrive.
description: Used Dorr-Oliver Merco 16L Solid Bowl Decanter Centrifuge, 316 stainless steel construction (product contact area), maximum bowl speed 4000 rpm, 5″ double lead conveyor with welded hardfacing, auger style solids discharge, plate dam liquid discharge, base, discharge chutes, bowl cover, 30hp drive motor, ECB backdrive, belt guard, serial# 70022-8.

title: Flottweg S3E-3/408 Sedicanter Centrifuge, 316SS
shortDescription: Flottweg S3E-3/408 sedicanter (solid-bowl decanter) centrifuge in 316 stainless steel with a 7750 RPM max bowl speed and 15 KW drive, unitized on a stainless skid. 2011 vintage in excellent running condition.
description: Max bowl speed 7750 RPM, 10,100 x G, rated @ 1 TPH, 4″ single lead TC spray conveyor, 15 KW motor 460/3/60, 4 KW backdrive, SIMP-drive 48.7:1 gearbox, feed tube, lube system, vibration switch/isolators, guards, chutes and control panel. Unitized on a SS skid. 2011 vintage. Excellent running condition.

title: US Centrifuge Duramatic A420 Self-Cleaning Centrifuge
shortDescription: US Centrifuge Duramatic A420 self-cleaning disc centrifuge with a 4000 RPM max bowl speed rated at 20 GPM, 5 HP drive, unitized on a stand with holding tank, pumps and PLC control panel. Very good condition.
description: Max bowl speed 4000 RPM, 2200 Gs, rated @ 20 GPM. 2 gal solids holding capacity, 5 HP motor 230/460/3/60/1750 RPM, unitized on stand with holding tank, pumps and PLC control panel. Very good condition.

title: Alfa Laval NX-314 Solid Bowl Decanter Centrifuge
shortDescription: Used Alfa Laval NX-314 solid-bowl decanter centrifuge with a 3250 RPM max bowl speed and 316 stainless steel product-contact areas, mounted on a four-leg stand.
description: Used- Alfa Laval NX-314 Solid Bowl Decanter Centrifuge. Max bowl speed 3250 rpm, 316 stainless steel (product contact areas), base, casing, feed pipe, gearbox, main drive motor, safety guards, vibration switch, mounted on four leg stand.

title: Flottweg Z4E-4/401 Solid Bowl Decanter Centrifuge
shortDescription: Used Flottweg Z4E-4/401 solid-bowl decanter centrifuge with stainless steel product-contact areas, a 4000 RPM max bowl speed and dual drive motors, mounted on a stainless steel frame with control cabinet.
description: Used-Flottweg Z4E-4/401 Solid Bowl Decanter Centrifuge. Stainless steel (product contact areas), maximum rotation speed 4000 rpm, maximum sediment density 1.5 kg/dm3, maximum working temperature 0-100 deg.c. Screw speed 1-20 rpm. Adjustable skimmer liquid discharge, cobalt based scroll conveyor wear protection, unit driven by (2) motors: main drive ABB 30kW/400V/3ph/50Hz, scroll drive Loher 11kW/400V/3ph/50Hz motor, SIMP-drive 3.11, base, casing, feed pipe, bowl cover has nozzles for CIP. Includes control cabinet. Mounted on stainless steel frame.

title: Sharples SP-6500 Sludge Pak Basket Centrifuge
shortDescription: Used Sharples SP-6500 Sludge Pak 48 x 30 basket centrifuge in 316 stainless steel, top load / bottom unload with a pneumatically actuated plow and 40 HP hydraulic bottom drive.
description: Used- Sharples SP-6500 Solid Wall 48 X 30 Basket Centrifuge. 316 stainless steel construction (product contact areas). Top load, bottom unload. Pneumatically actuated plow assembly. Bottom driven with a 40 hp hydraulic motor.

title: Western States 30 x 18 Perforate Basket Centrifuge, 316L SS
shortDescription: Western States Quadra-Clean (Q-120) 30 x 18 perforate basket centrifuge in 316L stainless steel with a 1450 RPM max bowl speed, single-motion plow and 30 HP XP motor with VFD. 2006 vintage, prior pharmaceutical use, excellent condition.
description: Quadra-Clean design (Q-120), max bowl speed 1450 RPM, 900 x G, solids cap 3.35 cu ft, 75 PPCF max load. Single motion plow, feed and rinse pipes, sight glasses, nitrogen purge feed pipe, fully hinged top with hydraulically operated opening system with pumping unit. 30 HP XP motor 230/460/3/60/1765 RPM with VFD controls. Prior use: Pharmaceutical. 2006 vintage. Excellent condition.

title: Sharples Mark III 3PP-350H Perforate Basket Centrifuge, 316SS
shortDescription: Sharples Mark III model 3PP-350H perforate basket centrifuge in 316 stainless steel with a 3250 RPM max bowl speed and 2 HP variable-speed hydraulic drive, unitized on a skid. Reconditioned with full mechanical warranty.
description: Max bowl speed 3250, 2100 Gs, model 3PP-350H, 14 x 6″ basket ID. 2 HP variable speed hydraulic drive 208/230/3/60/3450 RPM, fumetite design, braking system, feed and wash pipes, vents, belt guard and controls. Unitized on a skid. Reconditioned with full mechanical warranty.

title: Rousselet Robatel DTS-1250-K2 Basket Centrifuge
shortDescription: Robatel 302 stainless steel clarifier basket centrifuge, model DTS-1250-K2, 48″ diameter x 30″ deep with a 316 stainless lined case, top load / bottom discharge, 1400 RPM max and single-motion plow. Sold without motor or controls.
description: 48″ diameter x 30″ deep Robatel 302 stainless steel clarifier basket centrifuge. Model DTS-1250-K2, serial #CF162. 316 stainless steel lined case, carbon steel internals. Basket 302 stainless steel. Top load, bottom discharge. No motor or controls. 1400 rpm max, 1300 Gs, 450 Kg max load. Air/oil single motion plow. Linear skimmer.

title: Western States 48″ x 25″ 316 SS Basket
shortDescription: Western States 48″ x 25″ basket only in 316 stainless steel, with 1/4″ drainage holes and an eight 7/8″ bolt-hole mounting pattern.
description: 48″ x 25″ 316 SS Western States, basket only. 1/4″ drainage holes. Eight 7/8″ bolt hole pattern.
